allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''totalPoints:'', d.get\(''totalPoints''\)\); coords=d.get\(''coordinates'',[]\); print\(''first coord:'', coords[0] if coords else None\)")

Bash(do node -e "const d=require\(''./server/cache-data/metadata/$f''\); console.log\(''$f:'', d.type, ''coords:'', d.coordinates ? d.coordinates.length : ''none'', ''startPoint:'', d.startPoint ? ''yes'' : ''no''\)" done)
